Status - Critical

System Linepack - 3,466 MMCF

Commercial Operations Notes: Shippers must trend their accounts into tolerance.

Pipeline Operational & Commercial Status can be found in LINK under Flowing Gas, Imbalance, Pipeline Operational & Commercial Status.
